title: Service Request System
description: Build a service request system with AI and NocoBase to manage categories, approvals, and progress through no-code tools.
description_cn: 用 AI 和 NocoBase 搭建服务申请系统，支持无代码管理分类、审批和处理进度。
author: NocoBase Team
prompt: Build a NocoBase app — Service Request System: a step-by-step service request form, category selection, service-level hints, approval requirements, a request list, and an AI service-request analysis report. Match the layout and signature visuals of this reference prototype: https://static-docs.nocobase.com/solution/templates/30-service-request.html
prompt_cn: 用 NocoBase 搭建一个应用 —— 服务申请表：分步服务申请表单、分类选择、服务等级提示、审批要求、请求列表和 AI 服务申请分析报告。布局和标志性视觉参照这个原型：https://static-docs.nocobase.com/solution/templates/30-service-request.html
